name: Cheddar Apple Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------TOPPING----------------------------------
Combine the sugar, flour, and cinnamon. Toss the mixture with the apple slices. Pour into a 9-inch square baking pan.
Combine the topping ingredients (flour, cheddar cheese, sugar, butter, milk, baking powder, and salt) in a separate bowl. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
Spoon the dough over the fruit mixture.
Bake at 400 degrees F for 30 minutes.
Use cooking apples such as Granny Smith's that have been cored.
